summary: Frontend-only verification of iteration 3 changes: owner login, one-click DCF from Trending Now, recommendation badges on Trending Now / News / DCF, DCF Excel export with recommendation, and direct deep-link to /modeling?ticker=. All 8 scripted UI scenarios passed end-to-end against the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: Modeling.jsx is ~1300 lines — consider splitting into per-tab files (SummaryTab/AssumptionsTab/DCFTab/MemoTab) and a separate /lib/dcfEngine.js for computeDCF/buildDefaults to keep components <700 lines.

Dashboard 'Earnings Calendar' and 'Analyst Actions' still navigate to /research?ticker=. If the product direction is one-click DCF, consider routing those to /modeling?ticker= as well for consistency (not in scope of this iteration's testids, just an observation).
Rating helper getRating() relies on newsSentiment string equality ('Positive'/'Negative'); confirm backend always returns exactly those capitalised strings (case-sensitive match).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 3 acceptance criteria are met. Verified flows: (1) owner login → dashboard, (2) Trending Now top idea (AEM in this run) shows 'Strong Buy' badge via data-testid='trending-top-rating', (3) clicking trending-top-idea navigates to /modeling?ticker=AEM and auto-loads the DCF (dcf-stat-bar visible), (4) DCF page shows 'Recommendation: Buy' badge via data-testid='dcf-recommendation', (5) clicking dcf-export-button triggers an .xlsx download (AEM_DCF_Model.xlsx) and a success toast 'AEM Excel model downloaded' with no error toast, (6) deep-link /modeling?ticker=MSFT auto-loads MSFT DCF and shows recommendation badge ('Recommendation: Buy'), (7) /news shows 10 news-suggestion-card elements each with a news-suggestion-rating badge (first one was 'Strong Buy'). All five rating labels (Strong Buy/Buy/Hold/Not a Good Buy/Avoid) are produced by /app/frontend/src/lib/rating.js getRating(). Excel exporter writes 'Recommendation' rows on Cover and DCF sheets (verified via grep). No console errors observed.

test_scenarios_executed.name: Trending Now top idea rating badge
DCF auto-load (dcf-stat-bar visible without further clicks)
DCF Excel export download + success toast, no error toast
News suggestion cards show rating badges
